title: stelis modesta
intro: Stelis modesta, a species of orchid native to the tropical regions of Central and South America, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Stelis modesta are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and act as an antiseptic agent. Herbal preparations of Stelis modesta typically involve infusing its flowers or leaves in water to create a tea, which is consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
